title: Al-Adiliyah Madrasa
summary: Al-Adiliyah Madrasa (Arabic: الْمَدْرَسَة الْعَادِلِيَّة, romanized: al-Madrasah al-ʿĀdilīyah) is a 13th-century madrasa located in Damascus, Syria.
text:
Al-Adiliyah Madrasa (Arabic: الْمَدْرَسَة الْعَادِلِيَّة, romanized: al-Madrasah al-ʿĀdilīyah) is a 13th-century madrasa located in Damascus, Syria.

Modern day
In 1919 CE, the National Museum was assembled inside this school. It holds now the Arabic Language Academy in Damascus.
